originalTitle: Wall Street has set a sky-high bar for companies to clear this earnings season. They just might pull it off.
summary: Analysts have set a sky-high bar for second-quarter earnings. However, Piper Sandler thinks corporate America can still clear it.
content: Analysts have set a sky-high bar for second-quarter earnings. However, Piper Sandler thinks corporate America can still clear it.
chineseTitle: 华尔街为公司在本财报季的表现设定了极高的门槛。他们可能会成功。
chineseSummary: 分析师为第二季度盈利设定了极高的标准。然而，派珀桑德勒认为美国企业界仍然可以清除它。
chineseContent: 分析师为第二季度盈利设定了极高的标准。然而，派珀桑德勒认为美国企业界仍然可以清除它。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
